metadata.title: Wan 2.7 Image - AI Image Generation & Editing | Marble AI
metadata.description: Alibaba's Wan 2.7 image family. Advanced unified model for image generation and editing, delivering realistic details, precise color control, and accurate text rendering.

hero.title: Wan 2.7 Image
hero.description: Alibaba's advanced unified image model. Seamlessly integrates generation and editing with exceptional photorealistic detail and precise control.

introduce.title: About Wan 2.7 Image
introduce.label: Model Overview
introduce.description: Wan 2.7 is Alibaba's next-generation image model that bridges the gap between creation and editing. It offers unparalleled control over faces, colors, and text, making it ideal for professional creative workflows.

items.title: Unified Workflow
items.description: Streamline your creative process with a single model for both image generation and instruction-based editing.

items.title: Realistic Portraits
items.description: Deep customization of facial features, bone structure, and skin details for authentic-looking portraits.

items.title: Precise Color Control
items.description: Maintain brand consistency with reference-based palette extraction and HEX-defined color distribution.

items.title: Advanced Text Rendering
items.description: Support for complex text layouts and long-form content across 12 different languages.

features.title: Key Features
features.description: Discover the advanced capabilities that define the Wan 2.7 series.

items.title: Multi-Image Editing
items.description: Work with up to 9 input images for complex reference fusion and multi-layered editing tasks.

items.title: High-Resolution Output
items.description: Support for up to 4K resolution in Pro scenarios, delivering professional production-grade quality.

items.title: Thinking Mode
items.description: Enhanced reasoning capabilities for better prompt adherence and understanding of complex visual logic.

items.title: Sequential Consistency
items.description: Generate up to 12 consistent images in a single request, perfect for storyboards and catalogs.

items.title: Interactive Control
items.description: Region-based editing with box selection and natural language instructions for localized refinements.

items.title: Physical Simulation
items.description: Advanced VAE architecture for realistic simulation of textures, lighting, and complex physics.

use-cases.title: Use Cases
use-cases.description: Explore how Wan 2.7 can transform your industry-specific workflows.

items.title: Commercial Photography
items.description: Create high-fidelity product shots and realistic character imagery with precise aesthetic control.

items.title: Brand Marketing
items.description: Develop campaign assets with consistent color palettes and accurate text rendering for infographics.

items.title: Comic & Storyboarding
items.description: Maintain perfect subject and style consistency across sequential scenes and multi-angle shots.

items.title: Digital Illustration
items.description: Refine and transform artistic visions using instruction-based editing and reference-guided modification.

items.title: UX/UI Design
items.description: Generate realistic interface elements and high-quality mockups with integrated text and icons.

items.title: Creative Education
items.description: Visualize complex concepts with accurate text-image compositions for infographics and reports.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Common questions about the Wan 2.7 Image model.

items.title: What is Wan 2.7 Image?
items.description: Wan 2.7 Image is Alibaba's unified foundation model that excels in both image generation and editing tasks within a single workflow.

items.title: What makes it different from other models?
items.description: It uniquely combines high-fidelity portrait control, 12-language text rendering, and precise color palette management in one system.

items.title: Can I edit existing images with Wan 2.7?
items.description: Yes! It supports prompt-based editing, multi-image reference fusion, and region-based interactive control for precise localized edits.

items.title: Does it support high-resolution output?
items.description: Wan 2.7 Image supports up to 2K resolution, while the Wan 2.7 Image Pro variant supports up to 4K resolution.

items.title: How does Sequential Storytelling work?
items.description: The model can generate up to 12 stylistically and subject-consistent images in one request, ensuring coherence across a series of frames.

items.title: Is 'Thinking Mode' available?
items.description: Yes, Thinking Mode can be enabled in supported text-to-image scenarios to improve reasoning and prompt following accuracy.

cta.title: Experience Wan 2.7 Image Today
cta.description: Unlock professional-grade image generation and editing. Start creating with Alibaba's most advanced model.
